title: Front Office Manager - Fortune Hotels - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Fortune Hotels - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Fortune Hotels in Amritsar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fortune Hotels:
Fortune Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortune Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
